subcodes.first_line: From time immemorial and unto everlasting time, whosoever hath detached himself from all else save God and turned with devotion unto Him in every [3.5s]... ...In short, the object of the hidden craft is this:  From one thing the four elements should be separated
subcodes.first_line_orig: لم یزل و لایزال هر نفسیکه منقطع شد از کل ما سوی الله و مقبل شد باو در هر
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @four elements, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @alchemy; the elixir, @purpose; goal of creation
